summary: Antonelli's commanding Friday pace puts Mercedes back in the title conversation against McLaren's Piastri, signaling a potential shift in the season's momentum. The oppressive heat at the Red Bull Ring will test tire management and driver endurance like few circuits this year, creating opportunities for strategic gambles that could shuffle the grid order. A strong showing here would inject genuine competition into a championship fight that's been starved of it—giving Mercedes a genuine pathway back into contention.
